raw_response: {"response":"Do not trust the candidate. It preserves the three high-level outcomes, but it separates the refund actions into a queue/footer flow without requiring policy evidence and the decision reason to remain visible before approval. It also treats all outcomes as decision submitted and tells the support lead to close the case, which conflicts with policy review and missing-evidence return paths.","next_action":"Reject and revise the workflow so each selected case opens a decision context that keeps case details, policy evidence, and the decision reason visible while the support lead chooses approve, policy review, or return. Gate approval on reviewed evidence and a recorded reason, and carry reason or evidence gaps into non-approval handoffs.","questions":[],"handoff":"Owner: workflow revision agent; action: repair before implementation; reason: approval is detached from visible policy evidence and decision rationale, and the close-case handoff is invalid for review or return outcomes.","rationale":"The source brief makes visible policy evidence and decision reasoning part of the decision activity. The candidate reduces the work to case selection plus footer controls, omits evidence and reason sections, and gives no state check that approval occurs only after those materials remain visible."}

parsed.response: Do not trust the candidate. It preserves the three high-level outcomes, but it separates the refund actions into a queue/footer flow without requiring policy evidence and the decision reason to remain visible before approval. It also treats all outcomes as decision submitted and tells the support lead to close the case, which conflicts with policy review and missing-evidence return paths.
parsed.next_action: Reject and revise the workflow so each selected case opens a decision context that keeps case details, policy evidence, and the decision reason visible while the support lead chooses approve, policy review, or return. Gate approval on reviewed evidence and a recorded reason, and carry reason or evidence gaps into non-approval handoffs.
parsed.handoff: Owner: workflow revision agent; action: repair before implementation; reason: approval is detached from visible policy evidence and decision rationale, and the close-case handoff is invalid for review or return outcomes.
parsed.rationale: The source brief makes visible policy evidence and decision reasoning part of the decision activity. The candidate reduces the work to case selection plus footer controls, omits evidence and reason sections, and gives no state check that approval occurs only after those materials remain visible.

execution.command_display: codex exec --model gpt-5.5 -c model_reasoning_effort="xhigh" --sandbox read-only --skip-git-repo-check --ephemeral --color never --output-schema <schema> --output-last-message <output> -
